title: Date picker not displaying correctly after first use
symptom: The date picker popup appears correctly the first time but fails to show on subsequent attempts.
applies_when: Using the date picker in the live version
Attempting to open the date picker multiple times
not_this_if: Date picker works correctly in the test version
root_cause: This is a known bug in the date picker component that is currently being fixed by the development team. It affects the visibility of the popup after the initial use.
fix_steps: Wait for the bug fix to be deployed by the WeWeb team
Check for updates regarding the date picker component
agent_instruction: Monitor for updates on the date picker bug fix from the WeWeb team.
